name: EchoCart
description: Voice-driven shopping agent. You speak, it finds products, compares prices, and places orders. Built for the next generation of commerce where people shop by talking, not typing.
audience: online shoppers frustrated with search, busy professionals, accessibility-focused users, voice-first consumers
